visual_description: A young man in a brown jacket stands centered in a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with shelves of glassware and metal objects. Two other individuals in dark clothing stand to the side, one pointing a wand forward while the other stands beside him. The young man looks forward with a neutral expression, his hands at his sides, while the others appear alert and focused on something ahead.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pitch and pace, and no noticeable inflection or background noise.
